parameters.name: index
parameters.label: Index
parameters.description: Selects which input to pass though to the output. The first input is 0.

parameters.name: blend
parameters.label: Blend between Inputs
parameters.description: Blends the input images when using floating point numbers in the parameter.

examples.label: Configure Index and Blend between Inputs
examples.code:
n = op('switch1')
n.par.index = 0
n.par.blend = True
n.par.filtertype = 'mipmap'
examples.description: Common settings from 15 real Derivative examples
